decision: Reject the Production claim and retain Production as inconclusive.
nextStep: Require independent Production identity/readback, authority, rollback reference, and an HGI-305-compatible packet or bounded temporary proof plan.
evidenceRequired: Exact Production project, deployment, alias, config, protection, and metadata-only binding readback.
Independent Production subject, store, cipher, and bearer identity.
Separate Production-request approval plus source/deployment-bound proof and rollback identity.
limitations: Preview proof, a live hostname, source SHA, readiness, local headers, and preflight cannot establish current Production.
Runtime persistence reads UPSTASH_REDIS_REST or KV aliases while the current preflight also requires BUNDJIL_UPSTASH_REDIS_REST metadata.
nonClaims: No Production deployment, alias, auth/session, provider, or consequence is established.
rollbackRevocation: Use the coordinated app deployment rollback owner; revoke temporary sessions, bypasses, and proof credentials and read back each target.
unsafeAmbiguities: HGI-305 must resolve the runtime/preflight persistence-binding dual inventory before a positive Production packet can be accepted.
